title: astragalus compressus
intro: Astragalus compressus, also known as milk vetch or Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Astragalus compressus include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defenses against diseases. Astragalus compressus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
